# Syed Ahmer Shah — Full LLM Reference

> Syed Ahmer Shah is a full-stack web developer and software engineering student
> from Hyderabad, Pakistan. He builds modern web applications, scalable backend
> systems, and maintainable software solutions with a strong emphasis on security,
> clean code, and efficient database design.

---

## Identity

- Full Name: Syed Ahmer Shah
- Date of Birth: 29 October 2006
- Location: Hyderabad, Pakistan
- Tagline: "Designing order within the digital wilderness."
- Dev Handle: @ahmershahdev
- Personal Handle: @ahmershah29

---

## About

Syed Ahmer Shah is a full-stack web developer and software engineering student
from Pakistan focused on building modern web applications, scalable backend
systems, and maintainable software solutions. He is currently pursuing a
Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering at HITMS while simultaneously
completing a three-year Advanced Diploma in Software Engineering (ADSE) at
Aptech Pakistan, both expected to be completed in 2028.

His primary areas of work include PHP, Laravel, MySQL, WordPress, HTML, CSS,
JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Git, and SEO. He develops responsive
websites and backend-driven applications with an emphasis on clean code,
efficient database design, security, and long-term maintainability.

Beyond development, Ahmer actively shares technical knowledge through articles
published across multiple platforms, with more than 30 published articles
covering software development and emerging technologies.

He has earned more than 20 professional certificates through internationally
recognized learning platforms and regularly incorporates modern AI-powered
development tools into his workflow while maintaining a strong focus on
software engineering fundamentals and independent problem-solving.

His long-term goal is to build reliable, scalable software products and
establish a career creating technology that delivers practical value for
businesses and users alike. He is currently expanding his expertise into
the MERN stack and cross-platform application development.

---

---

## Projects

### Commerza — Full Stack E-commerce Platform
- Repository: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/Commerza
- Stack: PHP, MySQL, HTML5, Bootstrap, jQuery, JavaScript
- Description: Production-grade e-commerce platform with a modern storefront
  and secure admin dashboard. Includes product management, shopping cart,
  user authentication, checkout (COD + Stripe), order management, reviews,
  and enterprise-grade security: CSRF protection, CAPTCHA, rate limiting,
  audit logs, and stock locking.
- README: https://github.com/ahmershahdev/commerza/blob/main/README.md
